name: AuditorAgent
description: An auditor agent that verifies transactions and demonstrates immutability and audit trail capabilities of the Mandate Ledger Service.

extensions.description: Supports the Agent Payments Protocol for audit verification.

skills.name: Check Ledger by Payment ID
skills.description: Verifies a transaction in the mandate ledger by payment_id. Returns transaction status, confirmation that the record exists, and AP2 signature verification results.

payment_id.description: Unique payment identifier (e.g., PAY_xxx or pay_xxx-xxx-xxx)

skills.name: Get Mandate History
skills.description: Retrieves detailed mandate history and audit trail. Can get full transaction history by transaction_id or specific mandate history by mandate_id.

transaction_id.description: Transaction ID to retrieve all mandate histories (Intent, Cart, Payment)

mandate_id.description: Specific mandate entity ID to retrieve history for a single mandate

skills.name: Test Mandate Integrity
skills.description: Tests the immutability of the mandate ledger by attempting prohibited operations (delete, update, modify). Demonstrates that the ledger rejects such operations to protect audit integrity.

identifier.description: Payment ID, transaction ID, or mandate ID that user wants to modify

operation.description: Operation user is attempting (delete, update, or modify)

details.description: Optional details about what the user wants to change
